axioms: Axiom list_hd_even_all_evens : forall (l : list Z) (x : Z) (l1 : list Z), hd l x /\ (exists (n : Z), x = 2 * n) /\ tl l l1 /\ all_evens l1 -> all_evens l.
axiom_proofs: Lemma list_hd_even_all_evens : forall (l : list Z) (x : Z) (l1 : list Z),
hd l x /\ (exists (n : Z), x = 2 * n) /\ tl l l1 /\ all_evens l1 -> all_evens l.
intros [| x] x1 l1 [Hh [[n Hev] [Ht He]]].
- inversion Ht. rewrite H in He. simpl. intuition.
inversion Hh. rewrite H0 in Hev.
